title: Jaipur、Rajasthan — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Jaipur、Rajasthan的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Jaipur是Rajasthan的一个城市，人口约4,050,000。The Pink City and capital of Rajasthan, famous for its stunning palaces, vibrant bazaars, and rich Rajput heritage and architecture.
